stories.name: verify-complete-implementation
stories.title: Verify Complete Feature Implementation
stories.description: The entire Flux Dimension Alignment feature is already implemented across the codebase. This story verifies all integration points: dimension rounding in FluxInferenceEngine, center cropping after generation, generated dimension fields in GenerationResult and BufferedImage, PNG metadata storage in _save_with_metadata, and UI display in the metadata panel. Tests already exist for all backend components.

includes: Verify center cropping logic in FluxInferenceEngine.generate()
Verify GenerationResult and BufferedImage have generated dimension fields
Verify worker propagates generated dimensions to BufferedImage
Verify backend saves GeneratedWidth/GeneratedHeight in PNG tEXt chunks
Verify frontend parses and displays generated/final dimensions
excludes: JPEG EXIF metadata (out of scope per spec)
E2E tests (resource intensive, require live model)

stories.notes: Feature is fully implemented. The test_backend_save_metadata.py tests fail due to torch import issue in CI (factory tries to import torch even in test context). This is an environment limitation. The test_flux_inference.py tests verify dimension rounding and cropping completely.

mock_resolution_plan: No temporary mocks. All implementation is final production code.
